chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Acquittal Appeal No.S-02 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Appl. In dispose of case For hearing of MA 3675/2024 15-10-2024 None present for the appellant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional P.G for the State. ***** None present for the appellant, nor any intimation is received so far. Compliance report dated 02.10.2024 furnished by Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Salehpat reflects that this Court’s order dated 01.04.2024 has been complied with and the possession of the disputed land has been handed over to the appellant/complainant. Such statement of Mukhtiarkar is also supported with the statement of appellant. Since none has appeared on behalf of appellant, listed application having served its purpose is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE Ahmad
